properties.description:
Panchamukhi Hanuman Mandir is a Hindu Temple on Gavane Road, Parbhani.
It consists multiple deities on the complex: Hanuman (to whom the temple is dedicated, Ganpati, Viththal-Rukmini, Mahadev/Shiv).
The temple for Mahadev is outdoors, beneath Peepal tree
